artifact.content_preview:
NGIS PHASE 3 — SPRINT REVIEW MEETING MINUTES
Meeting Date: March 3, 2026
Time: 13:00–14:30 EST
Location: WebEx / Room 4C-12, Place du Portage III, Gatineau

Attendees:
- Alice Tran (Project Manager) — Chair
- Bob Morrison (Technical Lead)
- Carol Nguyen (Infrastructure Architect)
- Dave Chen (Security Specialist)
- Marie Lefebvre (Change Management)
- Farida Osei (QA Lead)

Regrets: Director Okafor (represented by Alice Tran)

---

1. SPRINT 6 REVIEW (Feb 17 – Mar 3, 2026)

Completed Items:
- AD

extracted_tasks.text: Contact TechSupplier Account Manager for revised delivery commitment in writing
extracted_tasks.source_excerpt: AI-001: Alice Tran to contact TechSupplier Account Manager for revised delivery commitment in writing.

extracted_tasks.text: Complete knowledge transfer documentation for AD migration procedures and hand off to Carol Nguyen
extracted_tasks.source_excerpt: AI-002: Bob Morrison to complete knowledge transfer documentation for AD migration procedures and hand off to Carol Nguyen.

extracted_tasks.text: Prepare and submit updated SA&A documentation (PAW architecture, IA-5 controls) to TBS audit office
extracted_tasks.source_excerpt: AI-003: Dave Chen to prepare and submit updated SA&A documentation (PAW architecture, IA-5 controls) to TBS audit office.

extracted_tasks.text: Complete and distribute UAT test plan to all stakeholders for review
extracted_tasks.source_excerpt: AI-004: Farida Osei to complete and distribute UAT test plan to all stakeholders for review.

extracted_tasks.text: Conduct impact assessment on Site A cutover timeline given vendor delay. Present findings to steering committee
extracted_tasks.source_excerpt: AI-005: Carol Nguyen to conduct impact assessment on Site A cutover timeline given vendor delay. Present findings to steering committee.

extracted_tasks.text: Assess refactoring effort for migration script relying on deprecated legacy-sync API endpoint
Initiate knowledge transfer plan immediately given Bob Morrison's role as sole AD migration expert
extracted_tasks.source_excerpt: Knowledge transfer plan must be initiated immediately

extracted_tasks.text: Notify HR regarding Bob Morrison's potential departure
